overall.description: A foggy night walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city, starting in first-person perspective along a sidewalk with yellow railings, then switching to third-person to follow a character with green hair, finally passing under an elevated highway with red neon lighting. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with dense atmospheric fog and neon signage.

tall street lamps illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy urban sidewalk bordered by yellow safety railings. The atmosphere is thick with fog, illuminated by streetlights. Pedestrians occasionally walk past in the opposite direction, and distant neon signs are barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with ramen shop

events.description: camera perspective switches from first-person to third-person following a character with green hair

agents.ego_description: controlling a character with bright green hair and red patterned bodysuit walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with red ramen bowl and Japanese characters
tables and chairs outside the ramen restaurant

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a character with distinctive green hair. Walking past a ramen shop with bright neon signage, the sidewalk continues through the foggy commercial district with other pedestrians visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath elevated highway with red neon strips

events.description: walks under elevated highway overpass into covered intersection area
ambient lighting shifts to red from overhead neon strips on the overpass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through an intersection under the overpass, navigating around other pedestrians and waiting traffic

notable_agents.action: cars stopped at the traffic light under the overpass waiting to proceed

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure overhead
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the overpass ceiling
large screen displaying advertisements on the overpass support structure
tall palm trees visible in the fog near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a massive highway overpass illuminated by striking red neon strips overhead. The environment shifts to a covered intersection with digital billboards, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic waiting at lights. The fog persists but takes on a reddish hue from the overhead lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a foggy cyberpunk district that evolves from a dim, hazy sidewalk into a vibrant, red-lit urban intersection. It begins in a first-person perspective walking along a sidewalk bordered by yellow safety railings, where streetlights struggle to pierce through a thick, oppressive fog. As the camera shifts to a third-person view following a character with green hair, the scene opens up into a commercial district featuring the bright neon glow of a ramen shop. The movement then leads the character beneath a massive highway overpass, where the atmosphere transforms as the fog takes on a deep reddish hue from overhead neon strips. Finally, the environment expands into a covered intersection filled with digital billboards, palm trees, and idling vehicle traffic.
